_comment: Seeded OFFLINE from real ERP attribute names (§4) and real SKUs found in output/<brand>/ CSV exports. No live ERP/network calls. Fields mirror ilL-Spec-LED Tape with prototype-only additions noted below. GAPS (per §5): environment_rating + ip_rating are stored directly on each record here (in ERP they are indirect via templates); light_type is inferred from led_package; mounting_methods is the profile-family install set. These are clearly flagged so they are not mistaken for first-class ERP tape fields.
